ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Document ID associated with the compound */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Standard value associated with the compound */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard measurement */,
  "standard_relation" TEXT /* Relationship of the standard to a reference */,
  "pchembl" REAL /* pChembl value representing the potency */,
  "molregno" INTEGER /* Molecular registration number */,
  "canonical_smiles" TEXT /* Canonical SMILES representation of the compound */,
  "chembl_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL ID for the compound */,
  "target_dictionary" INTEGER /* Target dictionary identifier */,
  "target_chembl_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL target ID */,
  "l1" TEXT /* Level 1 classification */,
  "l2" TEXT /* Level 2 classification */,
  "l3" TEXT /* Level 3 classification */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the measurement */,
  "act" TEXT /* Activity status of the compound */,
  "mol" TEXT /* Molecular object for computation */,
  "processed_smiles" TEXT /* Processed SMILES representation */,
  "structure_type" TEXT /* Type of molecular structure */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "alogp" REAL /* Calculated logP value */,
  "hba" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond acceptors */,
  "hbd" INTEGER /* Number of hydrogen bond donors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of the standard (e.g., IC50) */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the standard measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., receptor, enzyme) */,
  "chembl_id" TEXT /* ChEMBL ID for the target */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt ID for the target */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity result */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound tested */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target tested against */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard used for measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured activity value */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the activity measurement */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of assay used */,
  "assay_description" TEXT /* Description of the assay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the molecular structure */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound associated with this structure */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the molecular structure */,
  "inchi" TEXT /* InChI representation of the molecular structure */,
  "molfile" TEXT /* MOL file representation of the molecular structure */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_structures_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Departmental affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of report creation */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., activity, target interaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity type */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_confidence_scores" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the confidence score */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Confidence score value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the confidence score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_confidence_scores_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assay */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of assay (e.g., biochemical, cellular) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assay */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol for the assay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compound set */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the compound set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compound set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_set_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the membership */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound set */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_set_memberships_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_set_memberships_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES compound_sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prediction */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound predicted */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target predicted against */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Predicted activity value */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
